name: andrej-karpathy-skills
description: Behavioral guidelines to reduce common LLM coding mistakes, packaged as a reusable Codex plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Bring Karpathy-inspired coding guidelines into Codex.
interface.longDescription: Install Karpathy-inspired coding guidelines in Codex so the agent surfaces assumptions, pushes toward simpler implementations, keeps changes surgical, and works from explicit success criteria.
defaultPrompt: Before I implement this, what assumptions am I making?
